verdicts.notes: Independently recomputed the exact Batch 010 manifest bindings and re-executed every frozen fixture through the real engine. Fresh composite-document probes covered outline subsequences, heading order and H2 occurrence, ordered/unordered and hidden-only list shapes, direct blockquote content, strong and inline-code placement, raw HTML/fenced/escaped lookalikes, duplicate-title Review behavior, retry-family anatomy, and prose/case/spelling isolation. The intentional inline-code-outside-list and hidden-only-list Matched boundaries were explicitly confirmed.
